Event: The Illusory Adventure
Event Date: 03/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E57
Clever Trick Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit deals pure damage equal to 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% of their spell power to a random enemy unit, and restores heath equal to 50% / 51% / 52% / 53% / 55% / 57% / 60% damage dealt.

Enhancement: 2
11000 Magic armor from the gems
Once in a while, the unit deals pure damage equal to 40% / 41% / 42% / 43% / 45% / 47% / 50% of their spell power to 2 random enemy units, and restores heath equal to 60% / 61% / 62% / 63% / 65% / 67% / 70% of the damage dealt.

Enhancement: 3
22000 Magic armor from the gems
Once in a while, the unit turns 3 random enemy units to stone for 4 sec. Petrified targets cannot move, and receive 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% more damage. The engraving's owner also deals pure damage equal to 50% / 51% / 52% / 53% / 55% / 57% / 60% of their spell power to these units, and restored health equal to 70% / 71% / 72% / 73% / 75% / 77% / 80% of the damage dealt.

Requirements:

Sage bot code: E57
